title: Lead Frontend Developer at Cognizant Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Cognizant Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!
